Create a new contact in ConnectUC: 在 ConnectUC 中创建一个新联系人
Enable or disable Do Not Disturb status: 启用或禁用 ConnectUC 中用户的“勿扰”状态
Find a Call Detail Record (CDR) by origi: 通过原来的呼叫ID查找通话详细记录(CDR)
Initiate an outbound call from a Connect: 从 ConnectUC 扩展发起出站呼叫
Send an SMS message through ConnectUC: 通过 ConnectUC 发送短信
Update a Call Detail Record (CDR) in Con: 在 ConnectUC 中更新通话详细记录 (CDR)
Select domain to which this trigger appl: 选择此触发器适用的域
Select the user who owns this contact: 选择拥有此联系人的用户
The email address of the contact: 联系人的电子邮件地址
The original call ID (origCallid) to sea: 要搜索的原始调用 ID (origCallid)
Select the device to use for the call: 选择要用于呼叫的设备
The ID of the CDR to update: 要更新的 CDR 的 ID
Triggers when a new call recording is av: 当有新的通话录制时触发
Triggers when a new call transcription i: 创建新的通话记录时触发
Triggers when a new call summary is crea: 创建新通话摘要时触发
Triggers when a new Call Detail Record (: 创建新的通话详细记录（CDR）时触发
Triggers when a new voicemail is receive: 收到新语音信箱时触发
Select users to which this trigger appli: 选择此触发器适用的用户
Select the SMS recipient numbers to whic: 选择此触发器所适用的短信收件人号码
